name: debug
usage: echo structured logs to stderr (equivalent to AGORA_DEBUG=1); does not change exit codes or JSON envelopes

name: no-color
usage: disable ANSI color in pretty output

name: output
usage: output mode for command results: pretty or json

name: pretty
usage: pretty-print JSON output when used with --json

name: quiet
usage: suppress success output (both pretty and JSON envelopes); rely on exit code. Errors still print on stderr.

name: upgrade-check
usage: print non-interactive upgrade guidance and exit

name: yes
usage: assume the default answer to confirmation prompts (equivalent to AGORA_NO_INPUT=1); never starts new interactive flows in JSON/CI/non-TTY contexts
